debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
⊢ ∀ (w : ℕ) (args : Vector (ZMod p) w) (e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)),
    ¬e.eval.val < 2 ^ w → ¬(Clap.assert_bits p inst✝ w args = true ∧ e = Exp.c (Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args))

failed_attempts:
by
  intros w args e h_bound ⟨h_bits, h_eq⟩
  subst h_eq
  rw [Exp.eval] at h_bound
  apply h_bound
  by_cases hp : p ≤ 2 ^ w
  · exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (ZMod.val_lt _) hp
  · push_neg at hp
    rcases args with ⟨l, rfl⟩
    simp only [bits2num, Vector.foldl, assert_bits, Vector.all, List.all_eq_true, beq_iff_eq, Bool.or_eq_true] at h_bits ⊢
    have : ∀ (l' : List (ZMod p)) k acc, (∀ x ∈ l', x = 0 ∨ x = 1) →
        acc.val < 2^k → 2^(k + l'.length) ≤ p →
        (l'.foldl (fun acc b ↦ b + 2 * acc) acc).val < 2^(k + l'.length) := by
      intro l'; induction l' with
      | nil => intros; simp; assumption
      | cons b bs ih =>
        intros k acc h_in h_acc h_p
        simp at h_in h_p ⊢
        apply ih (k+1)
        · exact h_in.2
        · have hb : b.val ≤ 1 := by rcases h_in.1 with rfl | rfl <;> simp
          have : b.val + 2 * acc.val < 2^(k+1) := calc
            _ ≤ 1 + 2 * (2^k - 1) := Nat.add_le_add hb (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 (Nat.le_pred_of_lt (by simp) h_acc))
            _ = 2^(k+1) - 1 := by
               rw [mul_comm, Nat.mul_sub_right_distrib, mul_one, ←pow_succ]
               apply Nat.add_sub_assoc (by simp)
            _ < _ := Nat.pred_lt (by simp)
          rw [ZMod.val_add, ZMod.val_mul, ZMod.val_cast_of_lt, ZMod.val_cast_of_lt]
          · exact this
          · apply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le this
            trans 2^(k + 1 + bs.length); · apply Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by simp) (by simp); · exact h_p
          · exact Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (ZMod.val_lt _) (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt h_p (by simp))
        · rw [Nat.add_assoc]; exact h_p
    specialize this l 0 0 h_bits (by simp) (by simpa using hp)
    exact this
